heading: Create the MongoDB Search Index
body:
In this section, you can learn how to create a MongoDB Search index named `lookup-with-search-tutorial`
on all the fields in the `sample_analytics.accounts` collection.

In your terminal, connect to your Atlas cloud-hosted
deployment or local deployment from [mongosh](mongodb-shell). For detailed
instructions on how to connect, see
[Connect to a Deployment](mongodb-shell/connect).

**Input:**

```shell
 use sample_analytics
```

**Output:**

```shell
switched to db sample_analytics
```

**Input:**

```shell
db.accounts.createSearchIndex(
  "lookup-with-search-tutorial",
  {
    "mappings": {
      "dynamic": true
    }
  }
)
```

**Output:**

```
lookup-with-search-tutorial
```
